en.sources.emptyStateTitle: Get started by connecting your sources
en.sources.name: Name
en.sources.pauseDescription: Pause data collection for this source
en.sources.resumeDescription: Unpause data collection for this source
en.sources.removeDescription: Permanently delete this source and all collected data

en.sources.removeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {name}? This action cannot be undone.
